description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray and white, with large windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The property features a fenced backyard with a small pool, a wooden deck, and lush landscaping including palm and flowering trees. The front of the house has a driveway with two parked cars and a gated entry leading to the backyard. An outdoor staircase connects the ground level to a raised patio area adjacent to the pool. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and an emphasis on open, functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a fenced backyard with a pool, and a driveway with two cars. The design is clean and contemporary, featuring a mix of gray and white surfaces and landscaped outdoor areas.
description_view_0: The rear and side of the house are visible, showing the driveway with two pink cars, a fenced backyard, and lush landscaping with palm and flowering trees.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the driveway, main entry gate, and the full backyard with a pool, deck, and outdoor seating, as well as the outdoor staircase.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the backyard, pool, wooden deck, and the outdoor staircase leading to the upper patio, with large windows visible on both floors.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the house is shown, featuring large windows and a balcony, with minimal landscaping visible from this angle.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple gate, short steps, and a minimalistic door with no porch or overhang, emphasizing clean lines and functionality.
